name: One Bowl Chocolate Brownie Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. In a large microwaveable bowl, heat the chocolate and butter on HIGH for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes, stirring halfway through the heating time until the chocolate is almost melted.
3. Continue stirring until the chocolate is completely melted and smooth.
4. Stir in the sugar until blended with the chocolate mixture.
5. Add the eggs and vanilla, mixing well.
6. Incorporate the flour, baking powder, and salt.
7. Mix in the chopped walnuts (if using) until the dough is soft.
8. Scoop rounded tablespoons of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 12 minutes or until set. Do not over bake.
10. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before removing from the cookie sheet.
11. Cool completely on a wire rack.
12. Store in an airtight container.
